LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SHERRY FONG'S MOTION TO STRIKE IMPROPER DAMAGE CLAIMS IN FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOOT AS TO THE 4TH, 5TH, AND 6TH CAUSES OF ACTION. THE MOTION TO STRIKE FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS GRANTED, WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENSE COUNSEL TO PREPARE ORDER FOR THE COURT'S SIGNATURE. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SHERRY FONG'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 2ND, 3RD, 5TH, 6TH AND 7TH CAUSES OF ACTION. ALSO, THE COURT ADOPTED AND MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION. (THERE WAS NO DEMURRER TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION, AS PREVIOUSLY STATED IN THE COURT'S ORIGINAL TENTATIVE RULING). DEFENSE COUNSEL TO PREPARE ORDER FOR THE COURT'S SIGNATURE. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SHERRY FONG'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT Appearances: Julie Garfield, Esq. Attorney at Law, (415) 472-5017; specially appearing for James Proctor, and Plaintiff and opposing party; Michael Burk, Esq., of Vogl Meredith, (415) 398-0200; appearing for Defendants Butterfly Life, dba, Intuitive Intentions, Inc.; Patricia H. Perry, Esq., of Bradley Curley Asianto, (415) 464-8888 x286; appearing for Defendant, Sherry Fong, and moving party. Argued and The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 2ND, 3RD, 5TH, 6TH AND 7TH CAUSES OF ACTION. Also, The Court adopted and modified its tentative Ruling as follows: THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION. (There was no demurrer to the first Cause of Action, as previously stated in the Court's original tentative ruling). Defense counsel to prepare order for the Court's signature. (302/CWW/JW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797

Notice Of Motion To Strike Improper Damage Claims In First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SHERRY FONG'S Motion To Strike Improper Damage Claims in first Amended Complaint. Appearances: Julie Garfield, Esq. Attorney at Law, (415) 472-5017; specially appearing for James Proctor, and Plaintiff and opposing party; Michael Burk, Esq., of Vogl Meredith, (415) 398-0200; appearing for Defendants Butterfly Life, dba, Intuitive Intentions, Inc.; Patricia H. Perry, Esq., of Bradley Curley Asianto, (415) 464-8888 x286; appearing for Defendant Sherry Fong and moving party. Argued and The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: MOOT AS TO THE 4TH, 5TH, AND 6TH CAUSES OF ACTION. THE MOTION TO STRIKE FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS GRANTED, WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. Defense counsel to prepare order for the Court's signature. (302/CWW/JW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
